data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Fixed + cutover verified. Code ACs met and merged (change 505: project.config LLM-Review copyCondition includes changekind:TRIVIAL_REBASE, Verified unchanged=NO_CODE_CHANGE, ADR-0041, config-check passes). Live cutover applied (refs/meta/config 1ef2cad..d9bb365) and CONFIRMED via REST GET /projects/rebar/labels/LLM-Review => copy_condition ends with 'OR changekind:TRIVIAL_REBASE'. Force-close because the 'live cutover' AC is a Gerrit runtime fact the code-grounded completion verifier cannot observe; verification evidence is the REST readback above. Back-out SHA 1ef2cad.". Session: be83cb07-f310-4a56-9249-1d43fbc31f84.
